Your word,
on-chain.

Lock XLM with a personal goal. Nominate a Judge. Hit your target and get it back — or lose it. No excuses are accepted by the blockchain.

The Flow

Three steps.
Real stakes.

🔒
Step 01

Create your commitment

Write your goal, set a deadline, choose your penalty — a friend's wallet or a burn address. Lock your XLM. The contract holds it.

⚖️
Step 02

Your judge watches

Nominate someone you trust. They see your goal in their Judge Inbox and review your progress when the deadline arrives.

⚡️
Step 03

The contract executes

Judge calls Pass and your XLM comes back in seconds. Judge calls Fail and it goes to your penalty address. No delays. No disputes.

Judge inbox
Run 10km before Sunday
From: Ade · Stakes: 30 XLM · Deadline passed
Awaiting
Publish blog post by Friday
From: Bola · Stakes: 20 XLM
Resolved
For Judges

A one-click verdict. No grey area.

Your Judge Inbox shows every commitment assigned to you — the goal, the deadline, the stake, and (in v1.5) the proof they submitted. You click Pass or Fail. The contract does the rest.

  • Filtered view — only your assigned commitments
  • One-click Pass or Fail — contract executes immediately
  • No funds pass through you — all transfers are contract-to-wallet
  • Evidence review in v1.5 — see proof before you decide
Goal Verification

Trust that scales with
your ambition.

Lumenpact starts with social trust and gets more verifiable over time. No oracle required to launch — your judge is your oracle.

Version 1
Live now

Trusted Judge

You nominate someone you know. They review the commitment and click Pass or Fail. No proof required — social trust is the mechanism.

Best for
Personal goals, habits, writing deadlines, fitness targets
Version 1.5
Coming next

Evidence + Review

You submit proof before the judge resolves — a photo, a link, a Strava activity. The URL is stored on-chain. Your judge decides with full context.

Best for
Public commitments, larger stakes, auditable outcomes
Version 2
Roadmap

Oracle Verification

For goals with a verifiable external signal — Strava, GitHub, Readwise — an oracle reads the API, posts the result on-chain, and the contract resolves automatically.

Best for
Training goals, coding streaks, reading targets, measurable output
Infrastructure

Built on Stellar. Native speed, near-zero fees.

Lumenpact runs on Soroban smart contracts — Stellar's EVM-compatible execution layer. Your stake is locked on-chain, your judge resolves on-chain, every transfer settles in five seconds.

Soroban Smart Contracts5s FinalityXLM NativeNon-CustodialFreighter · xBull · Albedo
View contracts →
Get started

Make a commitment
you can't back out of.

Lock your XLM. Name your judge. Ship the thing. The contract doesn't care about your excuses.
